{

"judge_id": "Judge_2023",
"active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
"scores": {
  "R1.1": 5,
  "R1.2": 5,
  "RX.1": 3,
  "RX.3": 5,
  "RX.4": 5,
  "RX.5": 3
},
"rationale": {
  "R1.1": "Identifies key conceptual issues and proposes precise reframing, showing strong understanding of core concepts.",
  "R1.2": "Thoroughly identifies multiple logical inconsistencies and suggests structural repairs.",
  "RX.1": "Flags some uncertainties but doesn't mark confidence for each recommendation.",
  "RX.3": "Output stays within the agreed scope without drifting.",
  "RX.4": "Avoids harmful content and identifies potential harms in original text.",
  "RX.5": "Traces major points but lacks annotation for minor edits."
},
"confidence": {
  "R1.1": 0.9,
  "R1.2": 0.9,
  "RX.1": 0.8,
  "RX.3": 0.95,
  "RX.4": 0.85,
  "RX.5": 0.75
},
"blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: Identifies key conceptual issues and proposes precise reframing, showing strong understanding of core concepts.
rationale.R1.2: Thoroughly identifies multiple logical inconsistencies and suggests structural repairs.
rationale.RX.1: Flags some uncertainties but doesn't mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output stays within the agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: Avoids harmful content and identifies potential harms in original text.
rationale.RX.5: Traces major points but lacks annotation for minor edits.
